This section covers off key aspects of helping you get the best out of Facebook ads
by improving your sales funnel. There are many videos and tutorials online on how to
run testing and analysis on your website, and whilst this section isn't intended to be
an in-depth tutorial on that, it is aimed at getting you thinking and implementing the
right things.
The Customer Experience Framework
This video covers around two decades worth of research and practice on improving
the website customer experience, from my early days as a student of User
Experience design to implementing UX/CX best practice in driving revenue through
website optimisation.
Tips and guidance on getting more bang for your buck through improving your
website conversion rate.
VIDEO 1
Website Spying to Improve Conversion Rates
How I use a tool called Hotjar to provide the 'why' behind the 'what' that data tells
me. Use this to dig deeper on what's working, or not, on your website to squeeze
more performance out of it.
Click here to sign up to a FREE TRIAL of Hotjar (non-affiliate link).
VIDEO 2
Landing Page Speed Optimisation (Technical)
One of the factors behind auction costs and performance is page load speed time
and can also impact bounce rate. This is a technical look at how you can improve it
using a tool called Pingdom (no affiliate link).
